pkgs.name: @ikenga/mcp-browser
pkgs.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that lets agents drive native child webviews in the Ikenga desktop app — open a pane on a partner portal (Spotify-for-Artists, Bandcamp, Linkfire, etc.), snapshot it, click, fill, and wait. Bypasses iframe CSP `frame-ancestors` by using the system webview.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/mcp-iyke
pkgs.description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that exposes the Ikenga desktop app's iyke control bridge — drive a running Tauri AI workspace from any MCP client (Claude, Cursor, etc.).

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-engine-claude-code
pkgs.description: Claude Code engine adapter for Ikenga — wraps the `claude` CLI as the default AI engine.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-engine-noop
pkgs.description: No-op engine adapter for Ikenga — proves the engine pluggability pattern; used as a test fixture and for shell-without-AI mode.

pkgs.name: @ikenga/pkg-hello
pkgs.description: Minimal Ikenga pkg — proves the registry install pipeline end-to-end without bringing any UI, sidecar, or MCP surface.
